_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: Quantification by μCT showed that the bone volume to total volume fraction (BV/TV) in mutants was decreased by 40% in the bone marrow cavity (0.086 ± 0.034 versus 0.051 ± 0.005) and reduced five fold in the cortical regions
details: 40% reduction in bone volume to total volume fraction (BV/TV) in bone marrow cavity (0.086 ± 0.034 versus 0.051 ± 0.005) and five-fold reduction in cortical regions (0.028 ± 0.015 versus 0.004 ± 0.007) compared to controls at day 7 post injury
